title: senecio forbesii
intro: Senecio forbesii, also known as Forbes' ragwort or Forbes' groundsel, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Senecio forbesii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Senecio forbesii is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throats, and skin conditions.
